phishing_messages.text: URGENT: Your bank account has been suspended! Click here immediately to verify your identity or your account will be permanently closed within 24 hours. Visit: http://secure-bank-verify.xyz/login
Congratulations! You've won $5000 cash prize. To claim your reward, send your SSN and bank account number to prizes@totallyreal.org
Dear valued customer, we noticed unusual activity on your PayPal account. Please confirm your password at: http://paypa1-secure.com/verify
Your Amazon package is on hold. Update your delivery info now: http://amaz0n-delivery.net/track
Hi, just wanted to confirm our meeting tomorrow at 3pm. Let me know if you need to reschedule.
